# Cee Ess Designs

> Cee Ess Designs is a freelance graphic design studio based in Melbourne, Australia, founded by Caitlyn Sinclair. The studio specialises in brand identity design, logo design, website design, and creative strategy for small businesses and entrepreneurs.

## About

Caitlyn Sinclair is a Melbourne-based freelance graphic designer with over 5 years of experience. She has completed more than 30 projects for over 20 clients, specialising in earthy palettes, refined typography, and minimalist design. Her tools include Figma, Adobe Illustrator, and Adobe Photoshop.

## Services

- [Brand Identity Design](https://cee-essdesigns.com.au/#services): Complete brand identity systems including wordmarks, logomarks, colour palettes, typography, and brand guidelines.
- [Website Design](https://cee-essdesigns.com.au/#services): Website design and redesign, landing pages, responsive UI design, and UX strategy.
- [Creative Strategy & Process Ideation](https://cee-essdesigns.com.au/#services): Creative direction, mood boarding, design strategy, and packaging design.

## Portfolio

- [Mr & Mrs Bailey T&N](https://cee-essdesigns.com.au/project-bailey.html): Brand identity for training and nutrition experts, featuring wordmark, monogram stamp, and brand collateral with an earthy neutral palette.
- [Brooke Brodie Celebrant](https://cee-essdesigns.com.au/project-brooke.html): Retro 70s-inspired brand identity for a marriage celebrant, including logo variations, wordmark, and stationery suite.
- [Brindle Pets](https://cee-essdesigns.com.au/project-brindle.html): Brand identity and website design for a premium pet products brand, with wordmark, web mockups, and brand collateral.
- [The Plants Project](https://cee-essdesigns.com.au/project-plants.html): Complete website redesign and custom icon set for an indoor plant retailer.
- [Lounge Lovers](https://cee-essdesigns.com.au/project-lounge.html): Technical drawings, packaging design, swing tags, and marketing materials for a furniture brand.
